name: Rule Change: The Traditional Way
description: Experience the pain of changing a business rule across multiple traditional systems
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: The Traditional Pain
scenes.summary:
4 hours of developer time, 4 systems manually updated, and a constant risk that one system got missed or has a subtle bug.

Every time the business rule changes, this entire painful process repeats.

What if there was a better way?
lessons: Every rule change requires updating ALL implementations
Risk of inconsistency grows with each copy
Time cost multiplies with each system

title: Rule Change: The Traditional Way
